description: A project the user has worked on.

description.description: Description of the project, the user's role, and outcomes.

url.description: URL of the project (website, repository, demo, etc.).

projectRef.description: Reference to the first-class id.sifa.project.self record, if this personal project entry corresponds to a collaborative project.

position.description: Reference to the associated id.sifa.profile.position record, if applicable.

startedAt.description: Project start date in YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD format.

endedAt.description: Project end date in YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit if ongoing.

labels.description: Self-label values for this project record.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.
